Check out our [[link:/category/Code|Code category]] for more tools.

## [[link:/tools/202|CodiumAI]]: Secure Code Review

[[link:/tools/202|CodiumAI]] helps developers write more secure code with AI-powered review.

- **Test generation**: Create security-focused unit tests

**Try CodiumAI**: https://www.codium.ai/
